ast.target: 响应在已发送标头后因错误而终止

ast.target: 流负载未正确结束

ast.name: warn
ast.source: response will send, but you shouldn't use res.writeHead in stream mode
ast.target: 响应将发送，但您不应在流模式下使用 res.writeHead

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Trying to send a NotFound error inside a 404 handler. Sending basic 404 response.
ast.target: 尝试在 404 处理程序中发送 NotFound 错误。发送基本 404 响应。

ast.name: warn
ast.target: 元 schema 不可用

ast.name: warn
ast.source: these parameters are deprecated, see docs for addKeyword
ast.target: 这些参数已弃用，请参阅 addKeyword 文档

ast.name: warn
ast.source: keywords option as map is deprecated, pass array
ast.target: keywords 选项作为 map 已弃用，请传递数组

ast.name: warn
ast.source: the default handler for 404 did not catch this, this is likely a fastify bug, please report it
ast.target: 404 的默认处理程序未捕获此错误，这可能是 fastify 的 bug，请报告它

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Warning: set-cookie-parser appears to have been called on a request object. It is designed to parse Set-Cookie headers from responses, not Cookie headers from requests. Set the option {silent: true} to suppress this warning.
ast.target: 警告：set-cookie-parser 似乎是在请求对象上调用的。它旨在解析来自响应的 Set-Cookie 标头，而不是来自请求的 Cookie 标头。设置选项 {silent: true} 以抑制此警告。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Unable to set escapeXML.toString (is the Function prototype frozen?)
ast.target: 无法设置 escapeXML.toString（Function 原型是否被冻结？）

ast.name: warn
ast.source: `scope` option is deprecated and will be removed in EJS 3
ast.target: `scope` 选项已弃用，将在 EJS 3 中移除

ast.target: 向 Node.js 工作线程发送数据的流式方式

ast.name: error
ast.target: 未找到

ast.name: message
ast.source: You are accessing the deprecated "request.connection" property. Use "request.socket" instead.
ast.target: 您正在访问已弃用的 \"request.connection\" 属性。请改用 \"request.socket\"。

ast.name: message
ast.source: You are decorating Request/Reply with a reference type. This reference is shared amongst all requests. Use onRequest hook instead. Property: %s
ast.target: 您正在使用引用类型装饰 Request/Reply。此引用在所有请求间共享。请改用 onRequest 钩子。属性：%s

ast.name: message
ast.source: You are trying to set a HEAD route using "exposeHeadRoute" route flag when a sibling route is already set. See documentation for more info.
ast.target: 您正在尝试使用 \"exposeHeadRoute\" 路由标志设置 HEAD 路由，但同级路由已设置。请参阅文档了解更多信息。

ast.name: message
ast.source: You are using route constraints via the route { version: "..." } option, use { constraints: { version: "..." } } option instead.
ast.target: 您正在通过路由 { version: \"...\" } 选项使用路由约束，请改用 { constraints: { version: \"...\" } } 选项。

ast.name: message
ast.source: You are using a custom route versioning strategy via the server { versioning: "..." } option, use { constraints: { version: "..." } } option instead.
ast.target: 您正在通过服务器 { versioning: \"...\" } 选项使用自定义路由版本控制策略，请改用 { constraints: { version: \"...\" } } 选项。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Modifying the "reply.sent" property is deprecated. Use the "reply.hijack()" method instead.
ast.target: 修改 \"reply.sent\" 属性已弃用。请改用 \"reply.hijack()\" 方法。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Variadic listen method is deprecated. Please use ".listen(optionsObject)" instead. The variadic signature will be removed in `fastify@5`.
ast.target: 可变参数 listen 方法已弃用。请改用 \".listen(optionsObject)\"。可变参数签名将在 `fastify@5` 中移除。

ast.name: message
ast.source: request.context property access is deprecated. Please use "request.routeOptions.config" or "request.routeOptions.schema" instead for accessing Route settings. The "request.context" will be removed in `fastify@5`.
ast.target: request.context 属性访问已弃用。请改用 \"request.routeOptions.config\" 或 \"request.routeOptions.schema\" 来访问路由设置。\"request.context\" 将在 `fastify@5` 中移除。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Direct return of "trailers" function is deprecated. Please use "callback" or "async-await" for return value. The support of direct return will removed in `fastify@5`.
ast.target: 直接返回 \"trailers\" 函数已弃用。请使用 \"callback\" 或 \"async-await\" 来返回值。直接返回的支持将在 `fastify@5` 中移除。

ast.name: message
ast.source: You are trying to set/access the default route. This property is deprecated. Please, use setNotFoundHandler if you want to custom a 404 handler or the wildcard (*) to match all routes.
ast.target: 您正在尝试设置/访问默认路由。此属性已弃用。如果您想自定义 404 处理程序或使用通配符 (*) 匹配所有路由，请使用 setNotFoundHandler。

ast.name: message
ast.source: You are accessing the deprecated "request.routeSchema" property. Use "request.routeOptions.schema" instead. Property "req.routeSchema" will be removed in `fastify@5`.
ast.target: 您正在访问已弃用的 \"request.routeSchema\" 属性。请改用 \"request.routeOptions.schema\"。属性 \"req.routeSchema\" 将在 `fastify@5` 中移除。

ast.name: message
ast.source: You are accessing the deprecated "request.routeConfig" property. Use "request.routeOptions.config" instead. Property "req.routeConfig" will be removed in `fastify@5`.
ast.target: 您正在访问已弃用的 \"request.routeConfig\" 属性。请改用 \"request.routeOptions.config\"。属性 \"req.routeConfig\" 将在 `fastify@5` 中移除。

ast.name: message
ast.source: You are accessing the deprecated "request.routerPath" property. Use "request.routeOptions.url" instead. Property "req.routerPath" will be removed in `fastify@5`.
ast.target: 您正在访问已弃用的 \"request.routerPath\" 属性。请改用 \"request.routeOptions.url\"。属性 \"req.routerPath\" 将在 `fastify@5` 中移除。

ast.name: message
ast.source: You are accessing the deprecated "request.routerMethod" property. Use "request.routeOptions.method" instead. Property "req.routerMethod" will be removed in `fastify@5`.
ast.target: 您正在访问已弃用的 \"request.routerMethod\" 属性。请改用 \"request.routeOptions.method\"。属性 \"req.routerMethod\" 将在 `fastify@5` 中移除。

ast.name: message
ast.source: reply.context property access is deprecated. Please use "request.routeOptions.config" or "request.routeOptions.schema" instead for accessing Route settings. The "reply.context" will be removed in `fastify@5`.
ast.target: reply.context 属性访问已弃用。请改用 \"request.routeOptions.config\" 或 \"request.routeOptions.schema\" 来访问路由设置。\"reply.context\" 将在 `fastify@5` 中移除。

ast.name: message
ast.source: You are using the deprecated "reply.getResponseTime()" method. Use the "reply.elapsedTime" property instead. Method "reply.getResponseTime()" will be removed in `fastify@5`.
ast.target: 您正在使用已弃用的 \"reply.getResponseTime()\" 方法。请改用 \"reply.elapsedTime\" 属性。方法 \"reply.getResponseTime()\" 将在 `fastify@5` 中移除。

ast.name: message
ast.source: The `reply.redirect()` method has a new signature: `reply.redirect(url: string, code?: number)`. It will be enforced in `fastify@v5`
ast.target: `reply.redirect()` 方法有了新签名：`reply.redirect(url: string, code?: number)`。它将在 `fastify@v5` 中强制执行

ast.name: message
ast.source: You are using the deprecated json shorthand schema on route %s. Specify full object schema instead. It will be removed in `fastify@v5`
ast.target: 您正在路由 %s 上使用已弃用的 json 简写 schema。请改为指定完整的对象 schema。它将在 `fastify@v5` 中移除

ast.name: message
ast.source: The %s schema for %s: %s is missing. This may indicate the schema is not well specified.
ast.target: %s 的 %s schema 缺失：%s。这可能表明 schema 未正确指定。

ast.name: message
ast.source: The %s plugin being registered mixes async and callback styles, which will result in an error in `fastify@5`
ast.target: 正在注册的 %s 插件混合了异步和回调风格，这将在 `fastify@5` 中导致错误
